start_trigger: JT confirms /property is live and send-ready
cut_rule: After 21 days and at least 5 connector sends, if zero replies or calls, fix the ask script first, then the blurb, then the page. Do not rebuild the page before fixing the ask.

asset: homepage hero Option B plus Workflow Audit offer block
start_trigger: JT confirms homepage conversion pass is live
minimum_sample: 10 buyer conversations if reached before 30 days
cut_rule: Review after 30 days or 10 buyer conversations, whichever comes first. If calls happen but audits do not sign, suspect call scope clarity before price. If forwards happen but no clicks/replies, suspect blurb/path.

asset: existing diagnostic_cta_click/generate_lead analytics reused for Workflow Audit CTA
start_trigger: JT confirms Workflow Audit CTA labels are live while existing event IDs remain wired
cut_rule: Use analytics only as support. At current traffic, hand-count sends, replies, calls, and paid audits; do not create a full analytics rebuild.
